name: the new CI gate step is appended without altering the existing cloud-conventions step
command: grep -q 'Cloud-architecture convention enforcement' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/.github/workflows/closed-loop.yml" && grep -q 'doctor.sh --check cloud-conventions --root' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/.github/workflows/closed-loop.yml" && echo x10-ci-additive 1>&2
